propositions: Project-specific code-review criteria merge successfully via overlay but never execute or evaluate, a silent failure indistinguishable from a rubric finding no issues.
Activated project criteria must run exactly once through a project-id-agnostic runner seam that appends project prompts only for the round_a fan-in step and never for round_b.
Logical project.<name> criteria must map to sanitized physical prompt ids while routing JSON continues keying on the logical id.
Missing or malformed activated project prompt/eval assets must raise a located LLMError before model execution rather than silently skipping or emitting an empty-findings gap.
The criteria eval CLI must accept only logical ids active in repository-effective criteria, selecting the correct gate and failing on unknown or dual-gate ambiguous ids.
Deterministic Pass 3 must apply repository-effective threshold, blocking posture, and nit-suppression routing without invoking an LLM, while overlay-absent repositories retain prior behavior.
